summary: Phase 2 frontend testing complete. Verified all new pages: UK Product Viability Score, 4 UK landing pages (Dropshipping, Winning Products, Product Validation, Trend Analysis), 2 policy pages (Cookie, Refund). JSON-LD schemas present on all key pages (homepage, pricing, how-it-works, about, viability score). Sitemap.xml includes all new URLs. Robots.txt blocks private routes. Footer updated with new links. ViabilityIndicator showing on homepage product cards. Analytics trackEvent calls verified on CTAs.
passed_tests: Homepage JSON-LD Schema - 3 schemas (Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication) present
Homepage ViabilityIndicator - 6 product cards showing UK viability scores
Homepage CTAs - trackEvent analytics on hero primary/secondary, view products, UK viability CTA, final CTA
Footer links - UK Viability Score, UK Dropshipping, Winning Products UK, Cookie Policy, Refund Policy all present
UK Product Viability Score page (/uk-product-viability-score) - hero with badge, 7 factors section, score interpretation tiers, example scores, FAQ accordion, CTA buttons
Viability Badge expandable - click shows explainer with progress bar and learn more link
Dropshipping UK page (/dropshipping-product-research-uk) - full content, FAQ, CTA, related links, JSON-LD schema
Winning Products UK page (/winning-products-uk) - full content, FAQ, CTA, related links, JSON-LD schema
Product Validation UK page (/product-validation-uk) - full content, FAQ, CTA, related links, JSON-LD schema
Trend Analysis UK page (/uk-ecommerce-trend-analysis) - full content, FAQ, CTA, related links, JSON-LD schema
Cookie Policy page (/cookie-policy) - readable content with Essential/Analytics/Third-party sections, last updated March 2026
Refund Policy page (/refund-policy) - Free trial, Cancellation, Refunds, Annual plans, Billing sections, last updated March 2026
Pricing page JSON-LD - SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList schemas present
Pricing toggle analytics - trackEvent fires on monthly/annual toggle
How It Works page JSON-LD - WebPage, FAQPage schemas present
About page JSON-LD - AboutPage schema present
Canonical tags - verified on /, /pricing, /how-it-works, /about, /uk-product-viability-score

Sitemap.xml - all new URLs included (uk-product-viability-score, dropshipping-product-research-uk, winning-products-uk, product-validation-uk, uk-ecommerce-trend-analysis, cookie-policy, refund-policy)
Robots.txt - blocks /dashboard, /admin, /api/, /login, /signup, /settings and other private routes
Comparison page analytics - trackEvent on CTA buttons
Free Tools page - 4 calculator tabs working, tab switching functional
critical_code_review_comments: JSON-LD schemas properly implemented using PageMeta component with reusable schema builders
ViabilityBadge component correctly tracks click events via EVENTS.VIABILITY_BADGE_CLICK
ViabilityIndicator compact component properly displays on homepage product cards
All UK landing pages use SeoLandingTemplate with consistent structure and analytics
Analytics service properly bridges to GA4 via window.gtag() when configured
Canonical tags use production domain (trendscout.click) as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully verified. Key additions: 1) UK Viability Score flagship page with expandable badge component, 2) 4 new UK landing pages using SeoLandingTemplate, 3) Cookie/Refund policy pages, 4) JSON-LD schemas on homepage (3), pricing (3), how-it-works (3), about (2), viability score (3), 5) Footer updated with new links in PRODUCT column, 6) ViabilityIndicator on homepage product cards, 7) Analytics trackEvent calls on homepage CTAs, pricing toggle, comparison page CTAs, landing page CTAs.

viability_components.ViabilityBadge: Expandable badge with progress bar and learn more link
viability_components.ViabilityIndicator: Compact inline indicator on product cards
